message:
refactor(sync): idiomatic retain patterns, simplified Drop/send, formatting

Sync primitives cleanup:
- pool.rs: replace 7 instances of position()+remove()/swap_remove() with
  retain() for waiter and return_waker cleanup — more concise, same semantics
- once_cell.rs: replace position()+swap_remove() with retain() for waiter
  cleanup in WaitInit::drop
- rwlock.rs: fix OwnedWriteFuture borrow conflict by cloning Arc before
  locking state, replace get_mut() with direct field access; flatten
  WriteFuture/OwnedWriteFuture Drop formatting

Runtime/channel:
- broadcast.rs: simplify Receiver::drop — use buffer.clear() in-place
  instead of take+drop pattern, removing redundant VecDeque allocation
- spawn_blocking.rs: simplify BlockingOneshot::send — hold lock through
  waker.take() instead of dropping guard before wake()
- deadline_monitor.rs: replace let-else early returns with .unwrap() in
  test helpers (checked_sub is infallible for 30s/20s/10s/5s offsets)

Formatting:
- gen_server.rs: sort imports alphabetically
- service.rs: flatten timeout call chain formatting
- tls/acceptor.rs + connector.rs: flatten ALPN negotiation check
- sync/mod.rs: add trailing newline
- tests/notify_bug.rs: assert! → assert_eq! with explicit expected values

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
